name: Garlic Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 bn Parsley, fresh, (stems removed), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop garlic and 1 lb of mushrooms.
2. Cut the remaining mushrooms into thin slices.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a 4-quart saucepan.
4. Sauté garlic and all the mushrooms for 3 minutes.
5. Remove from the pan and set aside.
6. Sauté bread crumbs in the remaining olive oil.
7. Return garlic and mushrooms to the pan; stir in parsley.
8. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
9. Add broth and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring often.
10. Season with salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce.
11. For a thicker soup, stir in a few teaspoons of corn starch dissolved in cold water until the soup clears and thickens.
